treatment_information.specific_treatment: debridement and repair of head laceration and management of fractures

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented for evaluation after fall with significant laceration and multiple fractures.
Surgery performed for laceration and fracture management.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up needed for any concerns with pain or new symptoms.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Patient is ambulatory with assistance; prognosis for recovery appears positive.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient requires assistance or aid (walker or cane) after discharge.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient is recovering well and is ready for discharge
